deterministic_target_note: Target is exactly reconstructed by sum(A1..A10) >= 4.
graph_protocol: train-only graph build with batch unlabeled test-case insertion and label-free embedding refresh
limitation_note: SHAP explanations are exact for embedding features in the trained XGBoost model. The mapping from embeddings back to Q-Chat or demographic variables is correlation-based and should be treated as approximate interpretability support rather than exact mechanistic attribution.
